title: C.A.R.S. mock WebSocket wire vocabulary
description: Canonical message-type names shared by spikes/mock-ws-server/server.js and SoupEngine (src/soup.ts). Drift breaks npm run verify:cars-wire. Normative narrative: docs/wcd-32-websocket-spec.md; naming: docs/CARS-NAMING.md.

soupEngine.note: Handled in handleWebSocketMessage switch; unknown types log in debug only.

mockServer.labTelemetryNote: Sovereign Lab (p31-sovereign-lab.html) streams trim coherence as labTelemetry; mock appends to room eventLog and broadcasts eventLog. Not sent by soup.ts — optional parallel client.

browserClientOutbound.note: playerState only when room !== mock (family mode); heartbeat in mock room; ping is spatial emoji ping.

moleculePayloadFields.description: sanitizeMolecule (server) / ghost update (client) — inspectable shape for classrooms
